top_signals.title: China Factory Activity Worsens in Warning Sign for Economy
top_signals.summary: China’s factory activity slowed in May as disruptions from a five-day break added to pressures on global demand and input costs from the continuing conflict in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China 'Missing Opportunity' to Engage, Says German Chief
top_signals.summary: Germany's defense chief Carsten Breuer said China missed an opportunity to engage at the political and military level this weekend with other countries in Asia and beyond. Breuer spoke in an interview with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin on the sidelines of the Shangri-La Dialogue, Asia's premier defense conference. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Deep Sea Minerals to list on Nasdaq
top_signals.summary: The company currently has no active projects but aims to secure a portfolio of seabed mining concessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Glencore, Gentile back historical Irish region project sporting 3.3% zinc, 10% lead
top_signals.summary: Fueled by the C$12 million raised in March, Group Eleven has more than tripled the size of its planned drilling program for PG West.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
